language.title: Language
language.description: Choose the display language for the application.

mode.title: LED mode
mode.description: Choose output mode and tune static color when needed.
mode.lockedReasonCalibration: Complete calibration before enabling LED mode.

startupTray.title: Startup & Tray
startupTray.launchAtLoginDescription: Start LumaSync automatically when you log in.
startupTray.trayInfo: The app runs in the system tray when closed.

aboutLogs.title: About & Logs
aboutLogs.logsDescription: Application logs are stored locally for debugging.

updater.title: Update available
updater.checkForUpdatesDescription: Check for the latest version of LumaSync.

hotplug.usbDetected: USB LED strip detected. Add as output target?
hotplug.usbDisconnected: USB device disconnected. Continuing with remaining targets.

device.title: Device
device.description: Scan serial ports, choose one, and connect without restarting the app.

groups.supportedDescription: Detected USB adapters that match current allowlist.
groups.otherDescription: Manual fallback ports. You can still select and try Connect.
groups.empty: No ports in this group yet. Use Refresh to scan again.

selection.title: Manual selection
selection.description: Manual port selection stays available even when auto-detect misses.
selection.emptyHint: Choose a port to enable Connect.

port.missingHint: {{port}} is no longer visible. Reconnect the device or choose another port.

status.idleBody: Select a port and use Connect when ready.
status.scanningBody: We keep your list visible while scan runs in the background.
status.reconnectingBody: Auto-recovery is running with short retries. You can switch to manual connect anytime.
status.connectedBody: Connected on {{port}}. You can keep using this port for the next start.
status.missingBody: Your previous selection is no longer available. Pick another port and retry.
status.errorBody: Connection was not completed. Refresh, pick another port, and try again.
status.nextSteps: Tip: if your remembered port appears again, it will be selected automatically.

healthCheck.inProgressBody: We are validating visibility, support, and connection status.
healthCheck.passBody: All setup checks passed for the selected port.
healthCheck.failBody: Review the failed step details, then refresh, choose another port, or retry.

hue.title: Philips Hue
hue.description: Bridge discovery, pairing, and entertainment area setup.

bridge.noBridges: No bridges found yet. Start discovery or enter an IP manually.
bridge.networkHint: Could not reach {{name}} at {{ip}}. Make sure you are on the same network as your Hue bridge.

manualIp.title: Manual IP entry
manualIp.description: If auto-discovery did not find your bridge, enter its IP address.
manualIp.invalid: Enter a valid IPv4 address before submitting.

pair.linkButtonHint: Press the physical button on top of your Hue bridge, then wait a moment.

credential.repairHint: Your credentials have expired. Press the bridge button and pair again.

areas.title: Entertainment areas
areas.empty: No entertainment areas found. Create one in the Hue app first.

channelMap.title: Channel screen regions
channelMap.hint: Each channel maps to a screen region. Click to override.
channelMap.hintPositionMode: Drag channels to reposition. Shift-click to select multiple.
channelMap.hintPositionModeSelected: Drag to move selected channel(s). Use slider to adjust height.
channelMap.saveError: Position not saved — store error. Retry by moving the channel again.
channelMap.noChannelsBody: No channels available. Select an Entertainment Area first.
channelMap.selectZoneHint: Click a zone on the map to assign the selected channel.

readiness.pending: Readiness has not been validated yet.
readiness.recoveryHint: Area is not ready. Revalidate or choose another area.
readiness.activeStreamer: Another app is already streaming to this area.

wizard.pairInstruction: Press the physical button on your Hue bridge, then click Pair bridge.
wizard.areaInstruction: Choose the entertainment area you want to sync with your lights.
wizard.emptyBody: Connect your Philips Hue bridge to sync your room lights with your screen. Make sure your bridge is powered on and connected to the same network.
wizard.offlineBody: {{name}} ({{ip}}) is not responding right now. This usually means:
wizard.offlineReason1: You are on a different Wi-Fi network
wizard.offlineReason2: The bridge is turned off or restarting
wizard.offlineReason3: The bridge IP address has changed
wizard.offlineReset: Remove this bridge and start over

status.validatingBody: Stored Hue credentials are being checked silently.
status.pairingBody: Press bridge link button if needed, then retry pairing.
status.readinessCheckingBody: We are evaluating the selected area readiness.
status.idleBody: Start with bridge discovery or manual IP verification.
status.streamReadyBody: Pairing, area selection, and readiness are all valid.
status.streamNotReadyBody: Keep Start disabled until readiness check passes.
status.bridgeOfflineBody: Your registered bridge cannot be reached. Make sure you are on the same network, then try again. If the bridge has a new IP address, enter it below.
status.errorBody: Re-pair or retry the failed step before starting.
status.infoBody: Follow the current step to continue onboarding.

runtime.idleBody: Start from mode controls after readiness is current.

codes.HUE_STREAM_STOPPING: Hue stream stop is in progress.
codes.TRANSIENT_RETRY_EXHAUSTED: Retry budget exhausted. Manual reconnect required.
codes.AUTH_INVALID_CREDENTIALS: Credentials are invalid. Re-pair is required.
codes.CONFIG_NOT_READY_GATE_BLOCKED: Start gate blocked because readiness is stale or missing.
codes.HUE_STOP_TIMEOUT_PARTIAL: Stop timed out. Partial-stop cleanup is required.
codes.undefined: Status code unavailable. Waiting for runtime update.

checklist.title: Start checklist
checklist.waitCredential: Wait for credential validation to complete.
checklist.revalidate: Readiness is stale. Revalidate before Start.

partialStop.title: Partial stop
partialStop.body: Hue stop did not fully finish. Retry stop to complete cleanup.

timeout.title: Stop timeout
timeout.body: Stop reached timeout. You can retry stop without restarting the app.

HUE-NET-03.hint: Check network latency and bridge proximity

HUE-AUTH-02.hint: Press the bridge button and pair again

HUE-STR-01.hint: Select a valid area in Device settings

HUE-STR-02.hint: Reduce stream frequency or check bridge load

HUE-CFG-01.hint: Choose an area in Device settings

HUE-CFG-02.hint: Update bridge IP in Device settings

telemetry.title: Runtime telemetry
telemetry.description: Watch capture/send throughput and queue pressure in near real-time.

roomMap.comingSoon: Room map editor is coming in a future update.

empty.heading: No objects placed yet
empty.body: Use the toolbar above to add your TV, lights, and furniture.

roomMap.persistError: Map could not be saved. Changes may be lost on restart.

zones.deriveDisabledTooltip: Place a USB strip and TV anchor first
zones.emptyPanel: No zones defined. Press + Zone to create one.
zones.errNoTvAnchor: Place a TV anchor on the map before deriving zones.
zones.errNoUsbStrip: Place a USB strip on the map before deriving zones.
zones.calibrationApplyNote: Zone counts applied. Save in Calibration to persist.

section.title: Calibration
section.description: Reuse the same editor for first-time setup and advanced adjustments.
section.emptyState: No calibration saved yet. Open the editor to map your strip before enabling live mode.

page.title: Calibration
page.displayDescription: Select which monitor your LED strip is attached to.

overlay.title: Calibration Editor
overlay.unsavedDescription: You have unsaved calibration changes. Discard and close?

template.title: Pick a monitor template
template.description: Start with a template or skip to manual setup.

editor.title: LED map editor
editor.description: Adjust side counts, bottom missing LEDs, and traversal before saving.
